capture_script: src/__fixtures__/capture-real-langchain.mjs (run once from packages/adapter-langchain, replace runIds with deterministic values, commit result)
description: Real LangChain callback invocations captured from `@langchain/core` 1.1.39. Used as a frozen snapshot of the wire shape so adapter tests can assert against ground truth without running LangChain on every test run. The `e2e-langchain.test.ts` suite exercises the real library dynamically and is the drift detector; this fixture is the offline reference.
notes: tool.id.at(-1) === 'DynamicTool' (class name), NOT 'web_search' — the instance name lives only in `runName`. This was the root cause of the `unknown_tool` bug: the old adapter read `tool.name` which does not exist on real Serialized.

FakeListChatModel llmOutput is empty `{}`; the adapter falls back to `unknown` for model name on handleLLMEnd. This is a known cosmetic issue with fakes — real providers populate llmOutput.model_name.
runIds are scrubbed to deterministic values so the fixture is reproducible across captures.

events.output: search results for: what is langchain

prompts: Human: what is the meaning of life
